<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Health & Dental Insurance</h3>



<p>All Humber Polytechnic students are charged $116.65 per semester for IGNITE’s Health and Dental Insurance plan. The plan is administered by People Corporation, and provides coverage for prescription drugs, dental care, vision care, and more.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Please note that your coverage amounts do not reset every semester.</li>



<li>Fall 2025 coverage period: September 1st, 2025 – December 31st, 2025</li>



<li>Winter 2026 coverage period: January 1st, 2026 – August 31st, 2026</li>
</ul>

<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Annual Financial Statements</h3>



<p>IGNITE publishes annual financial statements that are audited by an independent accounting firm. These statements provide a comprehensive overview of our financial position, including revenue, expenses, assets, and liabilities.</p>



<p>The audit process ensures that our financial reporting meets the highest standards of accuracy and transparency. Each year, our auditors review our internal controls, test transactions, and verify account balances to provide reasonable assurance that our financial statements are free from material misstatement.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Board Meeting Schedule</h3>



<p>The IGNITE Board of Directors meets regularly throughout the academic year. All board meetings are open to students and the public, unless the board moves into a closed session for confidential matters as permitted under the bylaws.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>September 15, 2025 – Annual General Meeting</li>



<li>October 20, 2025 – Regular Board Meeting</li>



<li>November 17, 2025 – Regular Board Meeting</li>



<li>January 19, 2026 – Regular Board Meeting</li>



<li>February 16, 2026 – Regular Board Meeting</li>



<li>March 16, 2026 – Budget Approval Meeting</li>



<li>April 20, 2026 – Regular Board Meeting</li>
</ul>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Policy Documents</h3>



<p>IGNITE maintains a comprehensive set of policies that govern our operations, including financial policies, human resources policies, privacy policies, and student service policies. All policies are reviewed and updated regularly by the Board of Directors.</p>



<p>Students are encouraged to familiarize themselves with these policies, particularly those related to club funding, event planning, and the use of IGNITE facilities and services. If you have questions about any policy, please contact the IGNITE office.</p>

<h3 class="wp-block-heading">What services does IGNITE provide?</h3>



<p>IGNITE provides a wide range of services to Humber Polytechnic students, including health and dental insurance, transit passes, event programming, club support, and advocacy services.</p>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">How do I opt out of the health plan?</h3>



<p>Students who already have equivalent coverage through a parent, spouse, or employer can opt out of the IGNITE Health and Dental Plan during the opt-out period at the beginning of each academic year.</p>



<blockquote class="wp-block-quote is-layout-flow wp-block-quote-is-layout-flow">
<p>“The opt-out period typically runs from the first day of classes until September 30th for fall semester students.”</p>
</blockquote>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">How do I start a club?</h3>



<p>Starting a club is easy! You need a minimum of 10 interested students, a faculty advisor, and a completed Club Application Form. Submit your application to the IGNITE Clubs department and attend a mandatory orientation session.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Complete the Club Application Form</li>



<li>Gather at least 10 student signatures</li>



<li>Identify a faculty advisor</li>



<li>Attend the Club Orientation Session</li>
</ul>
